# WARNING: This file is generated by scripts/BuildCMakeLists.ps1.
# If issues arise, change the script, not this file.

# Run:
#   mkdir build
#   cd build
#   cmake .. -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=<Qt path, e.g., C:\Qt\6.10.2\msvc2022_64>
#   cmake --build . --config Release
#   cmake --install . --config Release --prefix <output_dir>

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(Fernanda LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# --- Qt auto-processing ---
# AUTOMOC: Runs moc on headers that contain Q_OBJECT/Q_GADGET (handles both
#          ClInclude and QtMoc items from the .vcxproj; CMake detects which
#          headers need moc automatically)
# AUTORCC: Compiles .qrc resource files into the binary
# AUTOUIC: Not currently needed (no .ui files), but harmless to enable

set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ON)

# --- Qt modules ---
# Parsed from <QtModules> in the .vcxproj QtSettings PropertyGroup.
# The .vcxproj uses lowercase semicolon-delimited names (e.g., "pdfwidgets");
# CMake's find_package requires PascalCase component names (e.g., "PdfWidgets").
# The LinguistTools component is added for translation support (lupdate/lrelease).

find_package(Qt6 REQUIRED COMPONENTS
    Core Gui Network Widgets Svg Xml PdfWidgets LinguistTools
)
qt_standard_project_setup()

# --- Sources ---
# From <ClCompile> items in the .vcxproj (excluding Coco sources, listed
# separately below). Backslashes converted to forward slashes.

set(FERNANDA_SOURCES
    src/AboutDialog.cpp
    src/CollapsibleWidget.cpp
    src/FnxModel.cpp
    src/Main.cpp
    src/old_FnxModel.cpp
    src/PlainTextEdit.cpp
    src/TabWidget.cpp
    src/TextFileView.cpp
    src/Tr.cpp
    src/Window.cpp
    src/WindowService.cpp
    src/Workspace.cpp
)

# --- Headers ---
# From both <ClInclude> and <QtMoc> items in the .vcxproj (excluding Coco
# headers, listed separately below). CMake's AUTOMOC makes the QtMoc vs
# ClInclude distinction irrelevant; all headers are treated uniformly and
# moc is run on whichever ones contain Q_OBJECT/Q_GADGET.

set(FERNANDA_HEADERS
    src/AboutDialog.h
    src/AbstractFileModel.h
    src/AbstractFileView.h
    src/AbstractService.h
    src/AccordionWidget.h
    src/AppDirs.h
    src/Application.h
    src/BetaAlert.h
    src/BuildMessages.h
    src/Bus.h
    src/CollapsibleWidget.h
    src/CollapsibleWidgetHeader.h
    src/ColorBar.h
    src/ColorBarModule.h
    src/ColorBarPanel.h
    src/Commander.h
    src/ControlField.h
    src/Debug.h
    src/DisplaySlider.h
    src/EditorPanel.h
    src/FileMeta.h
    src/FileService.h
    src/FileTypes.h
    src/Fnx.h
    src/FnxModel.h
    src/FnxModelCache.h
    src/FontPanel.h
    src/Formatters.h
    src/ImageFileModel.h
    src/ImageFileView.h
    src/Ini.h
    src/Io.h
    src/KeyFilters.h
    src/KeyFiltersPanel.h
    src/MagicBytes.h
    src/MenuBuilder.h
    src/MenuShortcuts.h
    src/MenuState.h
    src/NewNotebookPrompt.h
    src/Notebook.h
    src/Notepad.h
    src/NotepadFileSystemModel.h
    src/old_FnxModel.h
    src/old_NoOpFileModel.h
    src/old_NoOpFileView.h
    src/PdfFileModel.h
    src/PdfFileView.h
    src/PlainTextEdit.h
    src/Qss.h
    src/SaveFailMessageBox.h
    src/SavePrompt.h
    src/SelectionHandleOverlay.h
    src/SettingsDialog.h
    src/SettingsPanel.h
    src/SettingsService.h
    src/StyleContext.h
    src/StyleModule.h
    src/TabWidget.h
    src/TabWidgetButton.h
    src/TabWidgetCloseButton.h
    src/TabWidgetTabBar.h
    src/TabWidgetUnderlay.h
    src/TempDir.h
    src/TextFileModel.h
    src/TextFileView.h
    src/Themes.h
    src/ThemesPanel.h
    src/TieredSettings.h
    src/Timers.h
    src/ToString.h
    src/Tr.h
    src/TrashPrompt.h
    src/TreeView.h
    src/TreeViewService.h
    src/UpdateDialog.h
    src/Version.h
    src/ViewService.h
    src/Window.h
    src/WindowService.h
    src/WordCounter.h
    src/WordCounterModule.h
    src/WordCounterPanel.h
    src/Workspace.h
    src/XPlatform.h
    src/ZoomControl.h
)

# --- Coco (compiled as part of Fernanda) ---
# Coco is a git submodule with no CMakeLists.txt of its own. Its sources are
# compiled directly as part of the Fernanda target, matching the .vcxproj
# behavior where they appear in <ClCompile> and <ClInclude>/<QtMoc> items.

set(COCO_SOURCES
    submodules/Coco/Coco/src/Path.cpp
    submodules/Coco/Coco/src/StartCop.cpp
)

set(COCO_HEADERS
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Bool.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Concepts.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Fx.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Path.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Private.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/StartCop.h
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include/Coco/Utility.h
)

# --- Resources ---
# From <QtRcc> and <ResourceCompile> items in the .vcxproj.
# .qrc files are handled by AUTORCC. The .rc file (Windows resource script
# for app icon, version info, etc.) is passed to the resource compiler
# automatically by CMake on Windows.

set(FERNANDA_RESOURCES
    resources/Fernanda.rc
    external/External.qrc
    resources/Icons.qrc
    resources/Themes.qrc
    resources/Ui.qrc
)

# --- Target ---
# WIN32 sets the Windows subsystem (no console window), matching the
# .vcxproj <SubSystem>Windows</SubSystem> setting.

qt_add_executable(Fernanda WIN32
    ${FERNANDA_SOURCES}
    ${FERNANDA_HEADERS}
    ${COCO_SOURCES}
    ${COCO_HEADERS}
    ${FERNANDA_RESOURCES}
)

# --- Include directories ---
# From <AdditionalIncludeDirectories> in the .vcxproj, minus $(ProjectDir)
# prefix (CMake resolves relative to CMakeLists.txt location) and minus the
# %(AdditionalIncludeDirectories) inheritance macro (MSBuild-only concept).

target_include_directories(Fernanda PRIVATE
    src
    submodules/Coco/Coco/include
    external/bit7z/include
)

# --- Preprocessor definitions ---
# From <PreprocessorDefinitions> in the .vcxproj, minus:
#   _UNICODE / UNICODE: Set automatically by CMake for Unicode CharacterSet
#   %(PreprocessorDefinitions): MSBuild inheritance macro (no CMake equivalent)

target_compile_definitions(Fernanda PRIVATE
    NOMINMAX
    WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
)

# --- bit7z (pre-built static library) ---
# bit7z has no CMakeLists.txt in the project. Pre-built .lib files are stored
# under external/bit7z/lib/x64/{Config}/. An IMPORTED target with per-config
# paths replaces the .vcxproj <AdditionalDependencies> entries.

add_library(bit7z STATIC IMPORTED)
set_target_properties(bit7z PROPERTIES
    IMPORTED_LOCATION_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/external/bit7z/lib/x64/Debug/bit7z.lib"
    IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/external/bit7z/lib/x64/Release/bit7z.lib"
    MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG_MINSIZEREL Release
    MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG_RELWITHDEBINFO Release
)
target_link_libraries(Fernanda PRIVATE bit7z)

# --- Qt linking ---
# Each Qt6::Module target transitively provides its required include paths,
# preprocessor definitions (e.g., QT_DEBUG/QT_NO_DEBUG), and link dependencies.
# This replaces the implicit handling that Qt VS Tools performs via MSBuild.

target_link_libraries(Fernanda PRIVATE
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
    Qt6::Network
    Qt6::Widgets
    Qt6::Svg
    Qt6::Xml
    Qt6::PdfWidgets
)

# --- Translations ---
# From <QtTranslation> items in the .vcxproj. The build action is
# lupdate + lrelease (matching <BuildAction>lupdate_lrelease</BuildAction>).
#
# lupdate scans sources and updates .ts files; lrelease compiles .ts to .qm.
# The .qm files are output to the build directory (next to the .exe), NOT
# embedded as Qt resources. The application loads them at runtime via
# QCoreApplication::applicationDirPath().
#
# Separate lupdate calls are needed because Translation_en.ts requires the
# -pluralonly flag (from per-file <PluralOnly>true</PluralOnly> in the
# .vcxproj), while Translation_es.ts does not.

set(FERNANDA_TS_FILES
    translations/Translation_en.ts
    translations/Translation_es.ts
)

# EN: lupdate with -pluralonly
qt_add_lupdate(Fernanda
    TS_FILES translations/Translation_en.ts
    OPTIONS -pluralonly
)

# ES: lupdate (full)
qt_add_lupdate(Fernanda
    TS_FILES translations/Translation_es.ts
)

# lrelease: compile all .ts to .qm, output next to the executable
qt_add_lrelease(Fernanda
    TS_FILES ${FERNANDA_TS_FILES}
    QM_FILES_OUTPUT_VARIABLE QM_FILES
)

# --- Compiler options (MSVC) ---
# From the .vcxproj <ItemDefinitionGroup> compiler and linker settings:
#   /W3:          WarningLevel Level3
#   /MP:          MultiProcessorCompilation
#   /sdl:         SDLCheck
#   /permissive-: ConformanceMode
#   /GL:          WholeProgramOptimization (Release)
#   /Gy:          FunctionLevelLinking (Release)
#   /Oi:          IntrinsicFunctions (Release)
#   /OPT:REF:     OptimizeReferences (Release)
#   /OPT:ICF:     EnableCOMDATFolding (Release)
#   /LTCG:        Linker counterpart of /GL (Release)

if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(Fernanda PRIVATE
        /W3 /MP /sdl /permissive-
    )
    target_compile_options(Fernanda PRIVATE
        $<$<CONFIG:Release>:/GL /Gy /Oi>
    )
    target_link_options(Fernanda PRIVATE
        $<$<CONFIG:Release>:/OPT:REF /OPT:ICF /LTCG>
    )
endif()

# --- Pre-build: version string generation (Release only) ---
# From <PreBuildEvent> in the Release ItemDefinitionGroup. Runs a PowerShell
# script that generates Version.txt in the build output directory.

add_custom_command(TARGET Fernanda PRE_BUILD
    COMMAND $<$<CONFIG:Release>:powershell>
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-ExecutionPolicy>
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:Bypass>
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-File>
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/packaging/VSPreBuildGenVersionFullStringTxt.ps1">
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-OutputDir>
            $<$<CONFIG:Release>:"$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Fernanda>">
    COMMENT "Generating version string (Release only)"
)

# --- Install ---
# Defines the deployment layout for `cmake --install`. This is the CMake
# equivalent of the Windows packaging batch file's copy steps, and is what
# Linux packagers use to build .deb/.rpm/AppImage packages.
#
# Usage:
#   cmake --install . --config Release --prefix <output_dir>
#
# Produces:
#   <output_dir>/bin/Fernanda(.exe)
#   <output_dir>/bin/Translation_en.qm
#   <output_dir>/bin/Translation_es.qm
#   <output_dir>/bin/Version.txt

install(TARGETS Fernanda RUNTIME DESTINATION bin)
install(FILES ${QM_FILES} DESTINATION bin)
install(FILES $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:Fernanda>/Version.txt DESTINATION bin OPTIONAL)
